Comment: Low Momentum Account Intelligence Agent — orchestrates batch processing of low-momentum clients through AgentCore research, then merges results into CSV deliverables. Mirrors the upsell-research-pipeline pattern.

ListBatchFiles.Comment: Lambda lists all batch JSON files written by 01_preprocess_low_momentum.py for the given run_date. Returns an array of batch_s3_key strings for the Map state to fan out over.

ProcessBatches.Comment: Fan out across all batch files. Each iteration invokes Lambda A (prep) → Lambda B (worker) → AgentCore for one batch of 3 clients. MaxConcurrency=5 keeps AgentCore load manageable and avoids Step Functions history limit issues at 300+ client scale.

RunBatch.Comment: Lambda A: checks idempotency, invokes Lambda B which calls AgentCore for the batch.

BatchFailed.Comment: Catch individual batch failures gracefully — a single bad batch does not fail the whole pipeline. The postprocessor handles missing results.

RunPostProcessing.Comment: Lambda reads all individual client result JSONs from S3, merges them into two CSV deliverables (summary + detail) and a portfolio risk rollup JSON. Mirrors the upsell postprocessor pattern.

PipelineSucceeded.Comment: All batches processed and deliverables written. Check S3 for results.

PipelineFailed.Comment: Pipeline encountered an unrecoverable error. Check CloudWatch logs for the failing Lambda.
PipelineFailed.Cause: One or more pipeline states failed. See error details in execution history.
